title: Using an OR in Automation
excerpt:

posts.author: Mrossiter (Malachai)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking to have "when an item is created and the item number is equal to x or is equal to y or is equal to z move item to this board.

Using example numbers 22, 64, 45 I cant use the greater than or less than to select a range of numbers since there’s spaces in between.

Any help would be appreciated - thank you

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have? This is something you can do with Workflows if you have Enterprise
